after_hours_flow_summary.old: Greet caller and identify purpose. If emergency: collect name, phone, address immediately then attempt transfer with 90s timeout. If transfer fails: apologize and confirm callback within 15 minutes. If non-emergency: collect details and confirm next-business-day follow-up.
after_hours_flow_summary.new: Greet caller and identify purpose. If emergency: collect name, phone, address immediately then attempt transfer to 480-555-0192 with 90s timeout. If transfer fails: apologize and confirm callback within 15 minutes. If non-emergency: collect details and confirm next-business-day follow-up.
